extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image object string representation rather than a normal file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain: With the circuit open, $i_{1}(0.5)=0\,\mathrm{A}$. The time constant becomes $\tau=\frac{L}{R_{2}+R_{3}}=\frac{5}{2+0.5}=2\,\mathrm{s}$. Using the initial value $i(0)=0.47\,\mathrm{A}$ and $i(\infty)=0$, we obtain $i_{2}(t)=0.47e^{-0.5t}\,\mathrm{A}$ (upward) and $i_{3}(t)=0.47e^{-0.5t}\,\mathrm{A}$ (downward). Thus at $t=0.5\,\mathrm{s}$, $i_{2}(0.5)=0.37\,\mathrm{A}$ (upward) and $i_{3}(0.5)=0.37\,\mathrm{A}$ (downward).
